title: Nato says US cannot suspend Spain from alliance, after reported Pentagon email
summary_full: An internal Pentagon email reportedly outlines options to punish allies over a perceived lack of support for Iran war.
summary_public: An internal Pentagon email reportedly outlines options to punish allies over a perceived lack of support for Iran war.

ES.label: negative
ES.evidence: US cannot suspend Spain from alliance

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: lack of support for Iran war
